data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Secure transmission of data from client to server.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 with forward secrecy and DDoS protection.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Secure user verification and access control.
data.technical_spec: OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect, and two-step verification.

data.title: Continuous Security Monitoring
data.technical_spec: SIEM integrations, anomaly detection with machine learning.

data.title: Vulnerability Management Program
data.description: Regular scanning and patching of systems against vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Nessus and in-house security tools for scanning and remediation.

data.title: Data Protection Compliance
data.description: Adherence to international privacy standards and regulations.
data.technical_spec: GDPR, CCPA compliance tools, and internal privacy controls.
